role: Member of Technical Staff (Forward Deployed Engineer, Applied AI)
hero_headline: Forward Deployed Engineer, Applied AI, is the job I already run. I built this page 8 minutes after it posted.
hero_subline: Perplexity is turning search into tasks that get done, and forward-deployed is where that meets a real customer. I embed with the user, ship the applied-AI system, and move one metric.
pitch_oneliner: Week 1: sit with one enterprise user of Perplexity's API, rebuild their highest-friction workflow as an agent that acts (browse, retrieve, do), and hand back a working eval harness, not a deck.

jd_match.requirement: Embed directly with customers and ship applied-AI solutions end to end
jd_match.proof: Eurofirms (TOP-3 EU staffing): I embedded LLMs into a live recruitment workflow in the hands of 500+ recruiters, from discovery to production.

jd_match.requirement: Build agentic systems that complete multi-step tasks, not chatbots that talk
jd_match.proof: empresaAI runs in production: 7 specialized agents over a file-based bus with deterministic state and guardrails so they act, not chat.

jd_match.requirement: Move from a business problem to a shipped product in weeks, not quarters
jd_match.proof: ManoloBot (manoloelrobot.com) builds and deploys one Next.js app per day, end to end and in public.

jd_match.requirement: Translate between an executive's business case and an engineer's delivery
jd_match.proof: Senior Consultant at Capgemini Invent and former Head of Product at Olyverse (Geneva, 50k+ users): I sit on both sides every week.
